body_txt: Being Dragged Off to Hell (or if being clever, Descending to a Lower Plane of Existence) is a common villain fate, especially for those who previously made a Deal with the Devil . In an inversion of Ascend to a Higher Plane of Existence , they are dragged off screaming by some kind of Eldritch Abomination (generally in the form of a bunch of arms reaching out for them), leaving no body behind. Like Ascend to a Higher Plane of Existence , not all versions of hell are inescapable. See Escaped from Hell and Rescued from the Underworld . This is typically the absolute worst fate anyone can receive, as any and all torments covered under Fate Worse than Death can and (given the nature of eternal suffering) probably will apply with the addition of it starting at death. They might get pulled there by some Nightmare Hands via an Ankle Drag .
